case_title: ANGELICA T. RICHARD VS. DOMENIC J. CANNIZZARO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.30 FILED BY RICHARD, ANGELICA T. AS TO DEFENDANT CANNIZZARO, DOMENIC J. CANNIZZARO, FRANK T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO TRANSFER THIS CASE TO SUPERIOR COURT AND CONSOLIDATE IT WITH CASE NO. CGC-09-494624 IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT BOTH LAWSUITS RELATE TO A DISPUTE ABOUT THE SAME PIECE OF PROPERTY AND SHOULD BE TRIED TOGETHER. THE MATTER IS HEREBY ORDERED OFF CALENDAR IN THE SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CANNIZZARO, DOMENIC J.
TRANSFER RECEIPT FROM UNLIMITED WITH NEW CASE NUMBER, FILED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED SEP-30-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CANNIZZARO, FRANK T.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".
DECLARATION & REQUEST BY DEFT. FOR TRANSFER OF ACTION TO ANOTHER COURT. FILED BY DEFENDANT CANNIZZARO, DOMENIC J. AS TO PLAINTIFF RICHARD, ANGELICA T.
COURT ORDERED TRANSFER TO SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT LIMITED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO TRANSFER CASE AND CONSOLIDATE IT WITH CASE NO. CGC-09-494624.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-25-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE PRO TEM BRADLEY KAPLAN. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-25-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-25-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY RICHARD, ANGELICA T. CANNIZZARO, DOMENIC J.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED SEP-29-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CANNIZZARO, DOMENIC J.
CORRESPONDENCE ADDRESSED TO JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD RECEIVED & FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHARD, ANGELICA T.
OFF CALENDAR ORDER SENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED UNABLE TO FORWARD.
